title: Simple ? Survival
description:
Provide as series of tools and equipments for the early stage of survival mode.
Item expansion covering glasses, doors, etc.
body:
## Description
For some of us _(including the author himself)_ ,Minecraft may be too hard to survive.

However,those resources easily acquired  in the earlier stage of our game,like glasses, wooden doors,or leather equipments,just cannot help us to tackle all those crisis.

The mod brings expanded tools of glass,weapons made with doors,faster ways to gain ancient debris and netherite,etc.

![A powerful weapon made with iron door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c0f4357b458bea4d62b7b89a6d3a5c82743e9cb.png)
_As you can see,you can fight with your iron door._

JEI or something is recommended.

Go to MCBaike for detailed information!

Ways to use some of the tools are written ingame.

## About me
I'm noviciate in java so the mod is created with MCreator,witch is a little bit infamous in Chinese Internet.And I'll work hard to promote my skills.

**As a native Chinese speaker, my words above may be impropriety.I'm sorry and it is absolutely not my intention if my words offend someone.**

## Donation
No.
I'm not qualified yet.

I wish I can gain something innovating Minecraft, but not money.
